title: Revenue Modeling & Forecasting
description: Built, owned, and maintained complex revenue models for budgeting and scenario planning.
insight: Forecasts aren't about being right—they're about understanding the sensitivities. I built models that allow leadership to see exactly how a 1% change in NRR affects our 24-month cash position.

title: Revenue Architecture & Pricing Strategy
description: Designed and led a cross-functional initiative to restructure pricing for contract customers at PubNub.
insight: Pricing is often the most under-utilized lever in SaaS. I approached this as a logic problem: how do we lift revenue 6% without increasing churn? The answer was in the segmentation data.

title: Zero-to-One: Lyft Dockless E-Bikes
description: Critical player in launching Lyft's flagship dockless e-bike program.
insight: Operating in high-ambiguity environments requires a 'builder' mindset. At Lyft, I learned that scaling a physical product is 10% strategy and 90% operational architecture.

title: Full-Stack Data Lifecycle Management
description: Building robust pipelines and surfacing executive-level insights.
insight: I believe a great data leader must be able to write the SQL and then explain the 'Why' to the CEO. I manage the entire stack so nothing is lost in translation.
